contract: Show severity, evidence, and next action without decorative layout.
List local artifacts with clear type and path.
Keep the local review center dense, readable, evidence-focused, and free of decorative controls.

Show exactly three ordinary destinations: 確認 (confirm), 進行中 (running), and 設定 (settings); keep Regression, Evidence, Findings, and Advanced reachable through an explicit details group without removing their existing behavior.
Summarize 準備 (prepare), 確認 (review), 判断 (decide), 再確認 (recheck), and 完了 (complete) from current read-model truth only; never simulate progress, findings, recheck results, or completion.

Map the titles 大切な改善点を知りたい, 改善点を詳しく洗い出したい, and 重要な判断の前に念入りに確かめたい plus the short labels 大切な改善点を確認, 詳しく確認, and 念入りに確認 to standard, deep, and xhigh while preserving the exact canonical effort in the existing proposal request and never implying provider or browser execution.
Keep one current goal, one primary safe action, adjacent truthful status, and one result or empty state in the ordinary workspace; route technical details to the retained detail destinations.
Collect only the source text path, source type, review goal, review depth, optional context, and explicit local-write confirmation.
Show local validation failures without exposing full source text or command strings.
Make local-only, no-provider, no-upload, no-shell, and gate-neutral boundaries visible near source intake.
Summarize generated local proposal artifacts by count and type while hiding paths in the normal UI.
Use the prototype-style setting row and the shared save action to change Control Center display language only; never translate source evidence, provider text, or generated reviews.
Keep fixed-path persistence and locale internals in backend and CLI contracts; do not expose storage paths, locale codes, direction, or translation state on the ordinary settings page.
Keep detailed Playwright Test evidence, import, and CI policy behavior outside the ordinary settings page while preserving the existing backend, CLI, API, and read-model contracts.
Render compact non-engineer Playwright Test review material from the read model without raw artifact viewers, run buttons, CI triggers, provider controls, or gate effects.

Render one prototype-style Playwright Test setting row with a short purpose label and explanation; saving changes mode only, never runs browsers, contacts CI, or mutates review gates, and local_run remains CLI-only.
Fetch a named finished CI artifact through read-only gh after explicit confirmation; never trigger or modify CI.
Suggest, approve, summarize, and explicitly fetch from one approved GitHub Actions artifact policy without dropping target policy, commit SHA, lookup limit, or max-age fields; never trigger CI.
